text: # Enabling hyprlnd on NixO0S$S programs.hyprland = { enable = true; nvidiaPatches = true; xwayland.enable = true; I environment.sessionVariables = { # If your cursor becomes invisible WLR_NO_HARDWARE_CURSORS = "1"; k # Hint electron apps to use wayland NIX0S_OZONE_WL = "1"; B hardware = { # Opengl [o o L=Tale | AT -1 o - o M VT # Most wayland compositors need this nvidia.modesetting.enable = true; };
